parameters.title: Select spectra variance threshold
parameters.label: Select and remove spectral bands with variance below a given threshold after scaling to reduce the number of input bands in the Machine Learning modelling: Available scalers: minmax, standard and robust.

parameter.hint: The root fp of the project
The dataframe to use as input, raw = original spectra, previous = the latest saved parquet file(s), or state the name of the parquet file with spectra derived from earlier step(s) to use as input.
Scaler to apply before detecting variance, available options: minmax, standard and robust. If set to none, no variance threshold selection will be applied.
The threshold to set for detecting spectral bands with low variance. If set to 0, no variance threshold selection will be applied
